DatasetArn.note: When dependent op needs 'DatasetArn' param, use for_each=aws.forecast.list_dataset_groups and set DatasetArn='{{ item.Schema }}'

MonitorArn.note: When dependent op needs 'MonitorArn' param, use for_each=aws.forecast.list_monitors and set MonitorArn='{{ item.Baseline }}'

ResourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ResourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.forecast.list_tags_for_resource and set ResourceArn='{{ item.Key }}'

DescribeAutoPredictor.note: Multiple list fields — pick primary or emit one per field

DescribeDataset.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Schema.*

DescribeDatasetImportJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.DataSource.*

DescribeExplainability.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ExplainabilityConfig.*

DescribeExplainabilityExport.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Destination.*

DescribeForecastExportJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Destination.*

DescribeMonitor.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Baseline.*

DescribePredictor.note: Multiple list fields — pick primary or emit one per field

DescribePredictorBacktestExportJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Destination.*

DescribeWhatIfAnalysis.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.TimeSeriesSelector.*

DescribeWhatIfForecast.note: Multiple list fields — pick primary or emit one per field
